externalContracts.name: USDC
externalContracts.description: Spicy testnet USDC (6 dp). Used as the LP underlying asset and the swap router's settlement currency.

externalContracts.name: WCHZ
externalContracts.description: Wrapped CHZ (18 dp). Used by the Kayen router for native-CHZ swap paths.

externalContracts.name: KayenMasterRouter
externalContracts.description: Kayen V2 router used by ChilizSwapRouter for multi-token → USDC swaps.

externalContracts.name: WCHZ_USDC_Pair
externalContracts.description: Kayen pair (WCHZ/USDC) backing the CHZ → USDC swap path.
